items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Real Madrid, Barcelona offered Bernado Silva
items.summary: Bernardo Silva has been offered to Real Madrid and Barcelona, while Liverpool are monitoring Inter Milan right back Denzel Dumfries. Transfer Talk has the latest.
